summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected. Hydrated closed PRs are kept closed, hydrated open PRs are kept out of mutation except one security-sensitive credential-backup PR routed to central security, and unavailable refs are left non-mutating because live state was not hydrated.
